title: Colman Domingo responds to Elon Musk planning a 'historically accurate' AI 'Odyssey'
excerpt: The "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" guest host has some thoughts.
content_html:
The "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" guest host has some thoughts.

 

By

Sam Haysom

Sam Haysom

Sam Haysom is the General Assignment Editor, UK, for Mashable. He covers entertainment and online culture, and writes horror fiction in his spare time.

Read Full Bio

 

on July 23, 2026

Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Flipboard

In case you missed it, Elon Musk wants to make his own version of Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey using Grok — and Jimmy Kimmel Live! guest host Colman Domingo has some thoughts.

"Now Elon Musk is planning to create what he calls a 'historically accurate' version of The Odyssey, using his Grok AI," Domingo says in the clip above. "And by 'historically accurate', he means whiter than Christmas at Cracker Barrel. Of course this is all because Elon and his Musketeers are upset over the diversity casting of The Odyssey. And I don't wanna get technical here, but you can't make a historically accurate version of something that is totally made the f*** up.

"I mean, The Odyssey is fiction. You know, like The Hunger Games, or the president's cognitive exams. I mean come on, doesn't Elon Musk have better things to do? Wasn't this bitch supposed to be on Mars by now?"

content_html_zh:
“吉米·坎摩尔现场表演！” 嘉宾主持人有一些想法。

 

By

萨姆·海瑟姆

萨姆·海瑟姆

Sam Haysom 是英国 Mashable 的总作业编辑。 他报道娱乐和网络文化，并在业余时间写恐怖小说。

阅读完整的简历

 

于 2026 年 7 月 23 日

分享到 Facebook 分享到 Twitter 分享到 Flipboard

如果您错过了，Elon Musk 希望使用 Grok 制作自己版本的 Christopher Nolan 的《奥德赛》——还有 Jimmy Kimmel Live！ 客座主持人科尔曼·多明戈有一些想法。

多明戈在上面的视频中说道：“现在埃隆·马斯克正计划使用他的 Grok AI 来创造他所谓的‘历史准确’版本的《奥德赛》。” “他所说的‘历史准确’是指比饼干桶的圣诞节更白。 当然，这都是因为埃隆和他的火枪手们对《奥德赛》的多元化选角感到不安。 我不想在这里讨论技术问题，但你不可能对完全胡编乱造的东西做出历史准确的版本。

“我的意思是，《奥德赛》是虚构的。 你知道，就像饥饿游戏，或者总统的认知测试。 我的意思是，拜托，埃隆·马斯克没有更好的事情要做吗？ 这贱人现在不是应该已经在火星了吗？”

想要更多深夜的精彩吗？ 订阅 Mashable 的热门故事时事通讯。
